ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: If( ISNEW(), (AND(OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate )),AND( ISPICKVAL( Asset_Status__c , 'Putback Pending' ) || ISPICKVAL( Asset_Status__c , 'Buyback Pending' ) , ISBLANK( Putback_Buyback_Reason__c ) ))), AND( ISPICKVAL( Asset_Status__c , 'Putback Pending' ) || ISPICKVAL( Asset_Status__c , 'Buyback Pending' ) , ISBLANK( Putback_Buyback_Reason__c ) ))
